name: buywhere
description: Agent-native product catalog API. Search 1.5M+ products across Shopee, Lazada, Amazon, Walmart, and 20+ e-commerce platforms. Compare prices, find deals, browse categories.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Full-text search across 1.5M+ products from 20+ e-commerce platforms

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get full product details by BuyWhere product ID

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare prices for a product across all platforms

tools.name: browse_categories
tools.description: Browse the product category taxonomy tree

tools.name: get_category_products
tools.description: Get products within a specific category
